name: @humanspeak/svelte-scoped-props
description: Experimental Svelte preprocessor for scoped component class props.

scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:pages:build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run sync && vite dev --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.test:all: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:pages:build: pnpm run build && pnpm run sync && vite build
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run build && pnpm run sync && vitest run
